HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

5
6#include "GreenF.h"
7
8// -----------------------------
9// Construction & lifetime
10// -----------------------------
11GreenF::GreenF(dcmplx wvl, dcmplx eps) : wavelength(wvl),
12 k_B(2 * PI * csqrt(eps) / wvl) {}
13
14GreenF::GreenF(dcmplx wvl, const std::vector<dcmplx>& eps)
15 : wavelength(wvl), k_L(eps.size()) // Initialize k_L with the same size as eps
16{
17 for (size_t i = 0; i < eps.size(); ++i) {
18 k_L[i] = 2.0 * PI * csqrt(eps[i]) / wvl; // Compute k for each layer
19 }
20}
21
22GreenF::GreenF(dcmplx wvl, dcmplx eps, dcmplx mu)
23 : wavelength(wvl), k_B(2 * PI * csqrt(eps) * csqrt(mu) / wvl) {}
24
25GreenF::GreenF(dcmplx wvl,
26 const std::vector<dcmplx>& eps,
27 const std::vector<dcmplx>& mu)
28 : wavelength(wvl), k_L(eps.size()) // Initialize k_L with the same size as eps
29{
30 for (size_t i = 0; i < eps.size(); ++i) {
31 k_L[i] = 2.0 * PI * csqrt(eps[i]) * csqrt(mu[i]) / wvl; // Compute k_B for each layer
32 }
33}
34
35GreenF::~GreenF() {}
36
37// -----------------------------
38// Accessors & utilities
39// -----------------------------
40dcmplx GreenF::WaveVec() { return k_B; }
41
47dcmplx csqrt(dcmplx arg) {
48 if (imag(arg) == 0) {
49 dcmplx buf(real(arg), 0);
50 arg = buf;
51 }
52 return sqrt(arg);
53}
54
59dcmplx GreenF::EvErfc(dcmplx z) {
60 // std::cout<<z<<"\n";
61 if (thereIsNoLookupTable) {
62 return cerfc(z);
63 } else {
64 double x((real(z) + t->maxRe) / t->incRe);
65 double y((imag(z) + t->maxIm) / t->incIm);
66 int i(x);
67 int j(y);
68 if ((x < 0.) || (y < 0.) || (i > t->sizeRe - 2) || (j > t->sizeIm - 2)) {
69 return cerfc(z);
70 } else {
71 const double dx1 = x - i, dy1 = y - j;
72 const double dx2 = 1. - dx1, dy2 = 1. - dy1;
73 return (t->fun[i][j] * dx2 + t->fun[i + 1][j] * dx1) * dy2 +
74 (t->fun[i][j + 1] * dx2 + t->fun[i + 1][j + 1] * dx1) * dy1;
75 }
76 }
77}
78
79int GreenF::InitLookupTable(LookupTableBin* tin) {
80 t = tin;
81 thereIsNoLookupTable = 0;
82 return 0;
83}
84
85// -----------------------------
86// Global switches
87// -----------------------------
88bool GreenF::NeedsAccurate = false;
89
90void GreenF::EnableAccurate() {
91 std::cout << "Using high-accuracy integration." << std::endl;
92 NeedsAccurate = true;
93}
94
95bool GreenF::RequiresAccurate() { return NeedsAccurate; }
96
97int GreenF::Etm = 1;
98
99void GreenF::AssignEtm(int n) { Etm = n; }
100
101// -----------------------------
102// Layered wavenumber access
103// -----------------------------
104dcmplx GreenF::GetLayerWavenumber(size_t index) const {
105 if (index >= k_L.size()) {
106 throw std::out_of_range("Index out of bounds for k_L.");
107 }
108 return k_L[index];
109}
110
111std::vector<dcmplx> GreenF::GetLayersWavenumbers() const { return k_L; }
real
rvec real(cvec in)
Extract the real part of each component of a complex 3-vector.
